properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If you're in the battle for the Lord and right Just keep on the firing line If you win the battle, surely you must fight (Brother) keep on the firing line Oh you must fight be brave against all evil Never run, nor even lag behind If you would win for God in the right Just keep on the firing line

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Keep on the firing line Keep on the firing line Time is getting short Jesus coming soon (Brother) keep on the firing line

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There are many dangers everyone must face If you die fighting, there is no disgrace With the Lord for coward You will find no place

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: (Brother) keep on the firing line keep on the firing line Keep on the firing line Time is getting short Jesus coming soon

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: (Brother) keep on the firing line God can only use the soldier he can trust To keep on the firing line If you wear the crown Bear the cross you must
